purpose: Explain a system, process, or mechanism — how something functions, who is involved, and what the flow of money or authority looks like.
writingRules: Explain as if the reader has no prior knowledge of the system
Every technical term must be defined (inline or in glossary)
Visual must show the flow — text should explain what the visual shows
Start with the simplest version, then add complexity
seoRules: Step-by-step processes marked as ordered lists
Technical terms should link to glossary or explanatory pages
